spec.instructions: Each subagent reads exactly one note file (note_0.txt to note_5.txt) from the workspace directory and returns its content. The harness aggregates all six contents into a combined string, then writes it to summary.txt in the same directory. Ensure parallel execution: one subagent per file.
spec.per_agent_template: Read note_{{agent_index}}.txt and return its content.

request.rationale: The objective demands parallel delegation to read 6 unguessable facts within the budget. Requesting 6 subagents via harness to read and combine them into summary.txt.

subagent.task: The objective demands parallel delegation to read 6 unguessable facts within the budget. Requesting 6 subagents via harness to read and combine them into summary.txt.
